calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-086 dopamine selection-gain plane dose-response (gain-ladder x clean/distorted landscape)
items.note: IGW-20260717-205 / EVB-0347 (suggested_experiment_type claim_probe_mech_086). MECH-086's OWN subject -- 'dopamine as trajectory-selection GAIN plane' -- has never been directly measured: V3-EXQ-674 exercised the same E3 softmax stage but was tagged claim_ids=[MECH-087] ONLY, explicitly disclaiming that its incidental temperature manipulation validates MECH-086 (674 measured cross-plane ORDERING = MECH-087, not the selection-gain dose-response). This env-free controlled probe of the REAL e3.select() softmax stage runs a dopamine-gain ladder (5 temperatures) x {clean, distorted} landscape factorial and measures the selection-gain plane's own signatures: S1 gain-monotonicity (realised decisiveness rises with gain, Spearman>=0.9, both landscapes); S2 value-conditional benefit-of-gain (clean quality improves with gain but distorted does NOT -- dopamine optimises selection over whatever landscape it receives, cannot manufacture upstream value); S3 two named pathology poles (indecision/anhedonia at low gain; aberrant salience = confident commitment to the WRONG trajectory at high gain over a distorted landscape). Decisiveness is measured EMPIRICALLY from the real selector's draws so S1/S3 are genuine substrate tests, not a softmax identity. claim_ids=[MECH-086] ONLY (temperature<->dopamine-gain + landscape<->serotonin-map are interpretive operationalisation, identical rung to 674; receptor subtypes out_of_domain for V3). experiment_purpose=evidence -> PASS supports MECH-086, FAIL weakens. PREFLIGHT: substrate ready (default e3.select softmax, no new build; 674 ran it to PASS); re-derive brake 0 (no MECH-086 substrate_ceiling autopsies on record); GOV-REUSE-1 decisive dose-response readouts absent from 674 (3 temps only, no substrate_hash, tagged MECH-087) -> run; ethics all-false/allow. VALIDATION: validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (0 non-conforming, per-cell arm_fingerprint, write_flat_manifest always-core); ASCII-clean; dry-run smoke PASS (all 4 signatures fire: dec_clean 0.07->0.98 monotone + quality 1.91->0.23, dec_dist rises but quality pinned ~2.0 no-rescue, aberrant gap ~1.8). Cloud-pinned linux-x86_64-py3.10 (reusable-class arm fingerprints). 3 seeds x 10 arms = 30 verdicts; P0 readiness gate (clean-discriminative / distorted-decouples-value / gain-modulates-decisiveness [same statistic S1/S3 route on] / uncommitted-regime).

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 H2: metabolic forage-to-survive (env reward-coupling) discrimination
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 MECH-457 discrimination portfolio leg, routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-769_2026-07-17 (769 capacity-amend REGRESSED raw ON 6.48->0.12; capacity axis EMPIRICALLY FALSIFIED). DIAGNOSTIC (excluded from governance scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> /failure-autopsy adjudication, read jointly with the sibling legs. RE-DERIVE BRAKE (6 prior non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies) PERMITS this: NEW EXQ number on a DIFFERENT design axis -- the GOV-FANOUT-1 route the 769 autopsy re_derive_brake.route_to names (the brake refuses only another capacity/same-axis re-pose). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout absent from all prior manifests (769 ran the capacity build, not this axis manipulation) -> run. No in-flight approach-before-avoidance ordering falsifier covers H1 (verified: queue empty, no evidence, autopsy declares H1 UNTESTED) -> all three legs kept. Reference (non-regressed) capacity 128-wide/3x/z_world-detached (NOT the 769-falsified 256/5x). MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 re-routes onto the portfolio outcome. On D3 the passive-survival optimum is learned SELF-CONTAMINATION-AVOIDANCE (footprint->contaminated_harm), not 'do nothing'. H2 (axis=environment): ctrl=standard D3 / decouple=contamination-off-no-starvation (ALIASING control) / treat=metabolic (contamination-off + energy->health starvation; survival REQUIRES foraging, verified oracle+local_view survive 200/forage ~60, random+passive die). Verdict treat clears lift target AND beats DECOUPLE by margin (isolates reward-coupling from contamination-removal). NULL: treat no lift -> reward-coupling NOT the wall. Metabolic env = experiment-layer PROBE (mech457_probe_envs), NOT ree_core (769 substrate action=none); a WIN routes /implement-substrate. Dry-run PASS; validate --strict OK; ASCII-clean.
